allegation: Fail to provide driver details, contrary to section 172(2) of the Road Traffic Act 1988

courtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that procedure summary is served but device calibration, full intoxilyser record, and CCTV/dashcam export remain outstanding.
clientSummaryPreview:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers in your case (Ella Shaw). This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. A breath/device procedure summary is on the papers, but calibration certificates, the full intoxilyser record, and any CCTV/dashcam export are still outstanding. Device reliability remains provisional.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
doNotOverstate: Do not treat device summary as proof of reliability
Do not treat procedure summary alone as proof of device reliability or identity.
Do not state "CCTV stills served — master footage outstanding; ID not safely confirmed from current papers.
Do not state "Full CCTV stills served — master footage outstanding; ID not safely confirmed from current papers.
Do not treat device summary as proof of reliability
